race.description: Club Cowra Diggers Cup Class 1 Handicap
race.comment: HEY JUDE (3) comfortably won her maiden first-up over 1200m in heavy going at Nowra. Struggled with the class rise at Kembla last start but finds a more suitable assignment today. Will relish the soft conditions and is a great chance to return to the winner's list. THE CONTRACTOR (1) started favourite and finally recorded his maiden win last time out, cruising to victory over 1200m at Mudgee. Draws the right gate and at the fourth run back is ready for a crack at this longer journey. SPLENDID MAGNUS (9) is another coming here off a maiden win, her success achieved in heavy going over a similar trip to this at Orange four weeks ago. Lightly raced filly with more to offer. VICIOUS RUMOUR (6) rarely runs a bad race. Travelled on the speed and battled away to finish third at his first look at a heavy track last start over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Sure to give a good account again. THE GIT UP (10) is a perennial placegetter but excels in soft going which brings her right into this.
